issues.description: Action type is 'ReturnToHand' but effect text says 'place at the bottom of the owner's deck' — should be a deck placement action, not hand return
Target scope is 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' but effect text says 'Character' without specifying opponent — should target 'ChooseCharacter' (any character on board)

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Place up to 1 Character with a cost of 7 or less at the bottom of the owner's deck.
